stdout:
Table	Create Table
commissions	CREATE TABLE `commissions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `partnerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referralId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `paid` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `paidAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `opportunityId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `payingPartnerId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `receivingPartnerId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `commissionType` enum('platform_fee','referral_commission','prolink_net') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'platform_fee',
  `jobValue` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `feeRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `commissions_partnerId_partners_id_fk` (`partnerId`),
  KEY `commissions_referralId_referrals_id_fk` (`referralId`),
  CONSTRAINT `commissions_partnerId_partners_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`partnerId`) REFERENCES `partners` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `commissions_referralId_referrals_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`referralId`) REFERENCES `referrals` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
